subcodes.title: Shikkar-Shikan Shavand
subcodes.first_line: Warblers, mellifluous-toned, all the parrots of Ind shall be, Because of this Pársí sugar-cone which to Bengal goes… They that yearn for the abode of the Beloved, they that circle round the sanctuary of the Desired One
subcodes.first_line_orig: شکرشکن شوند همه طوطیان هند زین قند پارسی که به بنگاله میرود مکتوب آنجناب
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
